summary: Made a surgical exit-only seam adjustment so Chapter 11 hands off on Paul's secrecy and return to the study rather than repeating the solitary deck staging that opens Chapter 12.
edits: Shifted the final beat from Paul lingering on the deck to Paul going back inside before the house wakes.
Sharpened the handoff toward Paul's private 8 AM lawyer call in Martin's study, preserving the withheld-will beat.
